\tzpentry{ID4275}{Theta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4275 introduces Theta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Theta_i=\pi\frac{i+\tfrac12}{360}, \quad \Phi_j=2\pi\frac{j}{360}$
\]
